positive: A highly stylized, minimalist geometric floral pattern featuring interconnected lines, stylized blossoms, and abstract natural elements. The design should be set against a solid, light background, suitable for repeating print on fabric. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, mustard yellow, and cream. The composition should be symmetrical and highly intricate, with clean, distinct silhouettes that read well at a distance. The style should evoke modern Scandinavian graphic design combined with Art Deco symmetry, emphasizing high contrast and crisp edges. Studio lighting, vector quality, commercial print resolution.
negative: blur, lowres, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, artifacts, fuzzy, poor anatomy, multiple limbs, jpeg artifacts, cropped
